programmes.show_description: The Right Tough Stuff: Animated comedy. Linda fears for Gayle when she asks her to help shoot an audition tape for a reality TV show, and Bob struggles with a new electric grinder.
Jade in the Shade: Animated comedy. Linda and Louise stumble into a treasure-hunting adventure during a historical tour, and Bob, Tina and Gene host a group of street performers.
Stephen Mulhern returns with the exciting and iconic gameshow as one of the brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker for a chance of winning of a life-changing cash prize.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Gates of Gloom: Animated adventures. The gang return from their trip to the Yucatan peninsula to find that the whole of Crystal Cove has been enslaved by Professor Pericles.
Through the Curtain: Animated adventures. Using four keys, the gang find a hidden chamber and meet the Evil Entity, who reveals a secret that could change everything.
The Norse Case Scenario: Animated series. The gang goes on a camping trip to hone their mystery skills, but Viking ghosts attack and attempt to drive them away.
The People vs Fred Jones: Animated adventure series. Fred is on trial after being accused of being the real mastermind behind all the mysteries he's solved, but can Daphne save him?
Italian stallion Dom is hoping to be impressed by the style choices of three single ladies. Which of the girl's outfits will bag them a date?
Reality series. The results of biological age testing reveal shocking news, Sam heads to LA on a glamorous work trip, and the sisters let their hair down at an Usher concert.
Essex's finest head to Barcelona for sun, fun and plenty of drama. Gemma and Arg take a bold step in their relationship while Lockie and Yaz hit a stumbling block.
Hot Tea with a Side of Cookies: Cynthia has a plan to help Tanya and Kenya work out their differences. Later, Cynthia visits fiance Mike in Los Angeles.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programmes.show_description: Family, Family, Family: US reality series. Teresa kicks her wedding planning into high gear as Danielle hosts a mozzarella-making party to bring the girls together.
Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show as three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles and compete to win a 3,000-pound prize.
As the campmates battle it out to become a Legend, discover who won the first eating trial and which camp they end up in. Later, two campmates face a bone-chilling trial.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a special celebrity edition of the much-loved game show with Denise Van Outen, Coronation Street star Charlie Condou, and Jo Brand lining up this time.
After an explosive trip to Barcelona, the Essex residents are back with a bang. Yaz escapes to her family home and admits to her problems with Lockie.
Lions, and Tigers and Shade: NeNe and Cynthia attempt to work out their differences, and NeNe invites the ladies to a jungle-themed brunch.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programmes.show_description: Boys Will Be Boys: US reality series. The drama at Danielle's mozzarella party eases after an olive branch from Teresa, but Louie and Joe soon cause it to return.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the game show with Ashley Roberts, Tim Vine, and Mel Giedroyc competing to identify well-known phrases and win thousands for charity.
As the campmates battle it out to become a Legend, discover who won the first eating trial and which camp they end up in. Later, two campmates face a bone-chilling trial.
Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions are all about logic and common sense.
Cook for Your Life: US cooking competition. The chefs tackle a patriotic twist that turns local pride into plate power when they represent their home states in a culinary face-off.
Hard Times at Adam West High: Anarchic animated sitcom. Chris tries to use Stewie's time machine to undo a dysfunction that occurs while he is giving a book report at school.
A Wife-Changing Experience: Anarchic animated sitcom. Joe reinvigorates his sex life with Bonnie after seeing Lois naked, and Stewie embraces a new lifestyle with an electric SUV.
All About Alana: Anarchic animated sitcom. Lois' piano student Alana comes to work for the Griffins... and turns out to have sinister intentions.
Hayley Was A Girl Scout?: When a policeman arrests Stan for crashing into the CIA sign, Stan is sentenced to be Hayley's co-leader in her Girl Scout troop.
The Fast and the Spurious: Roger is forced to confront himself after a series of car accidents, and Klaus and Jeff bond after the Smiths get blasted into space.
To Catch a Beef: Animated comedy. Sergeant Bosco comes to Bob to learn how to cook burgers as part of his training for an undercover mission to nail a criminal burger joint owner.
Butt Sweat and Fears: Animated comedy. Tina gets her skirt stuck in a dryer when dealing with 'butt sweat', and Teddy joins a Belcher competition to make useful items out of trash.
Stephen Mulhern is back with the exciting and iconic gameshow as another brave contestant takes on the infamous Banker for a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize.

Come Undone: Animated series. Discovering the true Heart of the Jaguar, the Mystery Inc gang work as a team to stop the Evil Entity from bringing about the end of the world.
Beware the Beast from Below: Animated fun with Scooby-Doo and the gang. A hideous sewer beast is accidentally released from a radioactive barrel in the town of Crystal Cove.
Some Fred Time: Animated adventure series. An overworked Fred takes some time off from mysteries at Daphne's family's beach house - unfortunately, a walking shark then attacks!
There Wolf: Animated adventure series. The gang rushes Scooby to an animal hospital when he suddenly falls ill, but things go from bad to worse when a werewolf goes on the rampage.
In Manchester, Hope, Angel and Serena all hope to impress registrar Dominic with their style choices.
Reality series. Sam and Billie take mum Sue for a wellness check - but it's the sisters who end up getting some shocking results - and Sam discovers that someone has been stealing.
